title: Ore's Blog
author: Ore
description: Thoughts, ideas, and things worth sharing.
about:
Welcome to my corner of the internet.

This is where I write about the things that matter to me — ideas, observations, questions, and the occasional answer.

I believe in showing up, doing the work, and sharing what I learn along the way.

If something here resonates with you, I'd love to hear about it.
